channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: The Verge’s Father’s Day 2026 gift guide
item.description: With Father's Day on the horizon, happening June 21st, it's time to start thinking about what kind of gifts you want to buy for the fathers you care about. You know your dad best - he may be a man of simple pleasures who wants nothing more than to share a meal or drinks with […]

item.title: NotebookLM’s Gemini 3.5 upgrade adds a cloud computer and help finding sources
item.description: Google is rolling out "across the board" updates to NotebookLM. The AI-powered note-taking app now uses Google's upgraded Gemini 3.5 model, which will allow it to respond with "more accurate and reliable information," according to a blog post on Monday. Launched in 2023, NotebookLM allows you to interact with your notes and sources using AI, […]

item.title: WWDC 2026: All the news from Apple’s developers conference
item.description: Apple’s annual WWDC event is kicking off on June 8th with a keynote presentation starting at 1PM ET / 10AM PT, where Apple will announce major updates to iOS, macOS, and its other operating systems. Among those updates could be Apple’s delayed Siri overhaul, which has faced setbacks since it was initially announced at WWDC […]

item.title: NotebookLM’s new update will help you build source repository from chat
item.description: Google is making Gemini 3.5 the default model in NotebookLM

item.title: La Lenovo Legion Go S devient l’une des meilleures consoles portables PC à ce prix
item.description: La Lenovo Legion Go S est une machine qui connait bien les promotions alors que tous les prix augentent. Aujourd'hui, on la trouve à 479,99 euros au lieu de 649,99 euros.

item.title: Amazon now lets you design custom merch using AI
item.description: A new feature in the Amazon Shopping app allows users to generate designs with Alexa, then print them on products like T-shirts, hoodies, and tumblers.

item.title: Google Chrome va vous épater : sur le Mac, le navigateur bat un nouveau record de vitesse
item.description: Google a visiblement réussi à optimiser encore un peu plus la version macOS de son navigateur star. Sur le Mac, Chrome bat ainsi le record de vitesse détenu jusqu'à présent... par Google Chrome. Une jolie performance.

item.title: Tchap, la messagerie ultra sécurisée du gouvernement français a été piratée
item.description: Tchap, la messagerie ultra sécurisée du gouvernement français, a été piratée, exposant potentiellement les données de 73 000 agents et 643 000 messages. De son côté, le gouvernement assure que les conversations privées sont protégées par un chiffrement de bout en bout, mais que les messages publics ont pu être consultés.

item.title: WhatsApp says it caught new spyware attacks linked to NSO Group in violation of court order
item.description: The messaging giant announced that it disrupted a phishing campaign targeting its users with NSO’s spyware.

item.title: Pourquoi Fable fera l’impasse sur la VF (et l’IA y est pour quelque chose)
item.description: Le très attendu Fable vient de dater sa sortie, mais une mauvaise surprise attendait les joueurs francophones : le jeu fera l'impasse sur le doublage français. Un sort qu'il partage avec un autre mastodonte édité par Microsoft cette année, Forza Horizon 6. Derrière cette absence inédite pour des productions Microsoft de ce calibre se cache un véritable bras de fer en coulisses entre les comédiens de doublage et certains studios. ...

item.title: WWDC 2026: What to expect, from Siri’s highly anticipated revamp to Apple Intelligence and iOS 27
item.description: Apple's WWDC nears: Here's what you can look forward to.

item.title: Amazon brade à -40 % cette caméra de surveillance endurante sur 180 jours (et sans abonnement)
item.description: L'Eufycam C35 est une mini-caméra de surveillance WiFi sans fil en 1080p avec une autonomie de 180 jours à retrouver pour 59,99 euros au lieu de 99 euros.

item.title: I tried TikTok’s most viral hair hacks —what’s actually worth it
item.description: Not all hair hacks are created equal so I've tested dozens to work out which are worth trying, or worth avoiding

item.title: How to watch the World Cup on your phone: The ultimate mobile fan guide
item.description: How to watch the World Cup on your phone, including the best apps, how much mobile data you need, and how you can avoid expensive roaming charges.

item.title: Eero’s Pro 6E routers are down to their cheapest price yet in 2026
item.description: The Pro 6E was Eero’s top-end mesh Wi-Fi router back in 2022, and it’s still a solid pick if you want fast, reliable Wi-Fi coverage around your multi-room or multi-story abode. It can also deliver beyond gigabit wired speeds if your internet plan supports it. Ahead of Prime Day 2026, Amazon and Best Buy have […]

item.title: Cyberattaques contre WhatsApp : Meta révèle que le malware Pegasus continue de s’attaquer à ses utilisateurs
item.description: Condamné à payer près de 170 millions de dollars à Meta l'an dernier, NSO Group n'aurait pas pour autant renoncé à espionner les utilisateurs de WhatsApp. Meta a détecté de nouvelles tentatives de phishing ciblé, visant moins d'une dizaine de personnes, et reposant sur Pegasus.

item.title: Apple pulls Russia's state-backed MAX app from App Store over sanctions compliance
item.description: Apple has confirmed the removal of Russia's state-backed super-app, MAX, from the App Store due to sanctions compliance. While existing installations still function, users have lost critical push notifications for calls and messages. Here is everything we know so far

item.title: Apple CEO Tim Cook’s 6 defining WWDC moments
item.description: Cook’s run as Apple CEO stretched well beyond the keynote stage, but WWDC became the place where his biggest bets came into view. Tim Cook has less than three months remaining in his tenure as Apple’s CEO and, assuming he takes the stage as master of ceremonies at WWDC this week, it will be the 15th (and final) time he has done so as CEO.

item.title: Slash your printing costs: Epson EcoTank ET-2400 is the cheapest all-in-one ink tank printer right now, with big savings at Amazon
item.description: The Epson EcoTank ET-2400 all-in-one printer prints, scans and copies while slashing ink costs, and it's discounted at Amazon right now

item.title: Dell's new Nvidia RTX Spark mini PC has distinct Mac Studio vibes — and I think it could tempt buyers away from Apple given its current stock woes
item.description: Is the Dell XPS RTX Spark Desktop a genuine alternative to Apple's powerhouse? It might well be, alongside other mini PCs with Nvidia's N1X chip.

item.title: FlexiSpot just launched a massive early Prime Day sale on standing desks and office chairs — and these are my favorite office furniture deals right now
item.description: One of our top office furniture companies has price-cut its desks and chairs ahead of Amazon's big sale.

item.title: Sam Bankman-Fried applies for a pardon from Trump
item.description: The FTX co-founder is serving a 25-year sentence, doled out in 2024.

item.title: Watch Duty Is Adding Flood Alerts to Its Wildfire App
item.description: The popular wildfire tracking app is adding flood monitoring to its platform. It’s the first new disaster alert on the service, with many more to come.

item.title: Dutton Ranch fans are convinced this 'genuinely shocking' episode 5 subplot will turn Beth and Beulah into allies — and it's all thanks to this episode 2 Easter egg
item.description: In Dutton Ranch episode 5, Beth propositioned Beulah in the most unexpected of ways — but fans think their potential team-up started with something that shouldn't have happened.

item.title: Sega wants Virtua Fighter Crossroads to be more than just another fighting game
item.description: Virtua Fighter Crossroads isn't an outright reboot of Sega's biggest fighting series.

item.title: Comment les réseaux sociaux ont accroché les ados à l’école
item.description: Malgré d'innombrables plaintes dénonçant l'effet néfaste de leurs produits sur la santé mentale et les résultats scolaires des jeunes, les multinationales des réseaux sociaux ont continué de cibler les jeunes dans les écoles.

item.title: J’ai testé la GameSir G8 Plus, une manette en promo à moins de 50 € capable de transformer votre smartphone en console
item.description: Après quelques semaines passées avec la GameSir G8 Plus entre les mains, le constat est clair : cette manette USB-C pour smartphone a de sacrés arguments pour séduire. En plus, elle tombe en ce moment sous la barre des 50 euros. Alors, faut-il craquer pour vos sessions de jeu ? Voici mon verdict.

item.title: Ils flashent à 200 mètres de distance : ces nouveaux radars 3D vont devenir le cauchemar des automobilistes
item.description: Fini le coup de frein de dernière minute. De l'autre côté des Pyrénées, une nouvelle génération de radars crée des nuages de points 3D pour analyser votre conduite à 200 mètres de distance. Et en France ?

item.title: The Middle East is facing the threat of a full-scale war as Israel and Iran trade strikes
item.description: Officials from the region are pressuring the White House to rein in Israel’s strikes on Iran and Beirut. Israel and Iran traded fire early Monday in their first attacks since the U.S. struck a ceasefire with Tehran two months ago. Hours later, Iran’s military said that it would stop offensive operations.The renewed hostilities threatened to drag the Middle East back into a full-scale war.The war, launched by the U.S. and Israel on Feb. 28 with strikes on Iran, has shaken the global economy, driven energy prices up around the world and made many basics, including food, more expensive. Official...

item.title: Nintendo will pay a $40 million fine for faulty Joy-Cons
item.description: French authorities have fined Nintendo around $40m over faulty Joy-Cons.

item.title: Écran Mini LED 18″, RTX 5090, Core Ultra 9, 64 Go de RAM et SSD de 4 To : ce monstre de chez Asus voit son prix chuter de 1 200 €
item.description: E.Leclerc propose une réduction de 1 200 euros sur un PC gaming Asus ROG Strix Scar 18, une vraie machine de guerre suréquipée qui passe de 6 199 euros à 4 999 euros.

item.title: Gears of War E-Day : le jeu va-t-il mettre votre PC à genoux ? Les configurations Steam rassurent
item.description: Les configurations PC de Gears of War : E-Day sont en partie connues grâce à une mise à jour sur la page Steam du jeu. Et elles promettent une accessibilité même aux petites machines, mais elles demandent sans surprise un espace de stockage considérable sur votre SSD.

item.title: AI isn’t an exit strategy for hiring entry-level coders
item.description: Focus on business understanding grounded in technology, not on technology first. Vibe coding has become one of the first examples we’ve seen of generative AI transforming an established industry. It’s received a lot of attention for how it can help companies accelerate into the future, but that’s only an accurate description when the appropriate guardrails are put in place and when it’s embraced hand-in-hand with human developers. ...

item.title: Lepow 16in Quad Monitor for Laptop review: This truly portable, backpack-friendly display system is ready to transform any workspace
item.description: These 16-inch modular panels use an innovative Transformer connector to create a flexible quad-screen workstation that connects directly to your laptop and fits neatly into a backpack.

item.title: Hackers likely hijacked over 20,000 Instagram accounts with Meta’s AI chatbot
item.description: Hackers likely took over 20,225 Instagram accounts using Meta's AI support chatbot, the company confirmed in a notice filed with the state of Maine. In the notice, spotted earlier by Bleeping Computer, Meta blames a "bug" for the exploit that allowed attackers to hijack accounts without two-factor authentication simply by asking the chatbot for a […]...

item.title: Here are the IMAX theaters that can play 'The Odyssey' in true 70mm
item.description: Here's where you can watch Christopher Nolan's 'The Odyssey' in jaw-dropping IMAX 70mm.

item.title: Mainframe modernization is about trust, not migration
item.description: Done right, modernization aligns people, process, and platform innovation to deliver continuous value while protecting the most valuable currency - brand trust.

item.title: Presque 50 % de hausse en un an : le prix des forfaits mobiles explose avant le retour d’un marché à trois opérateurs
item.description: Le dernier baromètre du site Ariase confirme la tendance dévoilée par le site en mars 2026 : les forfaits mobiles ont fortement augmenté depuis 2025. Enfin, pas tous.

item.title: This clever peephole camera is perfect for renters, adding smart home video without wires, drilling, or an expensive subscription
item.description: EZVIZ's new EP4 door camera looks like an excellent alternative to video doorbells, especially for rental properties

item.title: HBO Max augmente ses prix en France, et le timing n’est pas anodin
item.description: HBO Max augmente ses tarifs de 1 à 2 euros pour tous les abonnements, avec effet immédiat pour les nouveaux abonnés. Les abonnés existants verront l'augmentation appliquée à partir du 9 juillet prochain.

item.title: The next Nintendo Direct is scheduled for June 9
item.description: Nintendo's next Direct will be on June 9.
